title: Data360 Monitor alert
description: Single alert emitted by the detection pipeline and consumed by the dashboard. Canonical fields come from the Obsidian product definition. Derived fields are added by bin/emit-alerts.js so the frontend does not need any presentation logic at runtime.

type.description: Detection strategy. D-010: only strategies 1 (abrupt_change) and 4 (anomaly) are in scope.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3. D-003: demo limited to GTM, HND, ARG, ECU, MEX.

category.description: UI category enum, used for filtering.

value.description: OBS_VALUE as Decimal serialized to JSON number. Frontend formats for display.

display.description: Pre-formatted display string for the value, e.g. {es: "USD 14.820 millones", en: "USD 14,820 million"}. Optional; if absent, frontend formats from value + unit.

disaggregation.description: Disaggregation tags. _T means total, _Z means n/a. Demo filters non-_T/_Z explicitly.

magnitude.description: Pre-formatted bilingual magnitude string for the card and detail header. Includes sign and unit, e.g. {es: "+38%", en: "+38%"} or {es: "−6,1%", en: "−6.1%"} or {es: "2,1σ", en: "2.1σ"}.

chart_series.description: Sparkline points for the detail panel chart. One point per historical period; the last one corresponds to observation.time_period.

is_change_point.description: When true, mark this point as the detected change. Optional.

regional_avg.description: Regional comparison value for this period. Optional, only for anomaly cards.

narrative_journalist.description: Technical narrative for journalists, includes context and caveats.

claim_tokens.description: Numeric claims appearing in the narratives that should be wrapped with PCN verification marks.

data360_dataset_url.description: URL to the dataset page on data360.worldbank.org.

csv_link.description: Direct link to the raw CSV at data360files.worldbank.org.

methodology_ref.description: Optional link to the indicator methodology.

detected_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when detection emitted this alert.

license.description: License of the source data, e.g. "CC BY-4.0".
